core_bet: Industry destocking bottoming and Qinghua 30 recovery in 2026-2027 will restore margin, profit growth, and PE multiple; failure extends earnings decline and keeps the stock at a deep value trap.
research_questions: Can Fenjiu maintain earnings quality in the industry downturn?
Is channel inventory a ticking time bomb?
Does the current price imply permanent earnings impairment?
Can micro catalysts (Lao Baifen restoration, Qinghua 20 resilience) offset macro consumption weakness?
Will gross margin stabilize above 74% in H2 2026?

question_verdicts.question: Can Fenjiu maintain earnings quality in the industry downturn?
question_verdicts.why_decisive: If cash conversion deteriorates or margins collapse beyond 72%, the bear-case fair value drops to ~70 CNY.
question_verdicts.conclusion: Earnings quality remains pristine (OCF/NP 1.53x, zero receivables), but gross margin declined 3.75pp, shrinking absolute profit; quality does not offset top-line pressure.
evidence_used: EV013: Q1 2026 gross margin 74.25% vs 78% YoY
question_verdicts.strongest_counterevidence: Gross margin erosion is accelerating in Qinghua 30, potentially dragging blended margin below 72% if industry downturn persists.
question_verdicts.model_or_valuation_effect: Keeps base gross margin assumption at 74.25% for 2026E; bear case uses 72%. Each 1pp margin change shifts net profit by ~0.35 bn.

question_verdicts.question: Is channel inventory a ticking time bomb?
question_verdicts.why_decisive: A sudden destocking event could cause revenue to drop 20-30% and erase 2026E profits.
question_verdicts.conclusion: Inventory risk has been largely defused; Q1 is seasonal shipment peak, Q2 destocking is underway, contract liabilities growth signals dealer confidence, but not fully conclusive until H1 sales data.
evidence_used: KPE03: management states Q1 is inventory peak, Q2 destocking normal
KPE04: channel inventory 2-3 months, Qinghua 20 destocking positive
question_verdicts.strongest_counterevidence: Contract liabilities could reflect forced advance payments, not end-demand; real sell-through remains unobservable (only 30% scan rate).
question_verdicts.model_or_valuation_effect: No impairment to revenue forecast; we keep base 2026E revenue at 36.1 bn, but widen bear scenario range.
question_verdicts.next_verification: Q2 2026 contract liabilities and revenue in H1 report.

forecast_takeaways.takeaway: Fenjiu's earnings power is temporarily impaired by mix degradation, but cash cycle superiority provides a floor; 2026E net profit likely ~11.1 bn, implying a 9% YoY decline.
forecast_takeaways.evidence_anchor: Q1 2026 OCF/NP 1.53x, contract liabilities +35.9%, Qinghua 20 shipment growth per KPE03.
forecast_takeaways.financial_implication: Full-year 2026E EPS 9.07 CNY, DPS ~5.9 CNY; current price embeds a 12x PE on depressed earnings.
forecast_takeaways.confidence_and_risk: Medium confidence; if H1 gross margin falls below 73%, 2026E net profit may be revised down to 10 bn.

forecast_takeaways.takeaway: Qinghua 30 remains the key profit-pool risk; without recovery, the bull case of 12.9 bn net profit is unattainable.
forecast_takeaways.evidence_anchor: KPE04: Qinghua 30 wholesale price 670 CNY vs 700+ normative; returns/rebates needed to maintain pricing.
forecast_takeaways.financial_implication: Qinghua 30 recovery would add ~2 bn to gross profit, driving EPS toward 10.6 CNY. Absent recovery, base case stands.
forecast_takeaways.confidence_and_risk: Low confidence on timing; recovery before 2027 is unlikely without industry upturn.

forecast_assumptions.historical_anchor: FY2025 revenue 38.72 bn; Q1 2026 implied run-rate ~34-35 bn
forecast_assumptions.base_case: -6.9% YoY to 36.06 bn (Q1 seasonal + gradual H2 recovery)
forecast_assumptions.bull_case: -3.4% YoY to 37.4 bn if Qinghua 20 accelerates and Lao Baifen recovers faster
forecast_assumptions.bear_case: -14.7% YoY to 33.0 bn if destocking deepens and Qinghua 30 slides
forecast_assumptions.rationale_and_evidence: Q1 revenue implied a YoY decline; Q2 is low season and destocking. We anchor H2 recovery on low base and stable Qinghua 20. Evidence: EV010, KPE03.
forecast_assumptions.sensitivity: 1% revenue change = ~0.28 bn net profit (at 26% net margin) = 0.23 CNY EPS

forecast_assumptions.affected_business: Qinghua series (47% of mix), Lao Baifen (13%), Bofen (26%)
forecast_assumptions.bull_case: 75.5% if Qinghua 30 price recovers and premium mix improves
forecast_assumptions.bear_case: 72.0% if Qinghua 30 requires heavier rebates and Bofen share rises
forecast_assumptions.rationale_and_evidence: Q1 margin decline was mix-driven; we assume gradual stabilization. KPE03 indicates Qinghua 30 pressure persists.
forecast_assumptions.sensitivity: 1pp margin change = ~0.36 bn net profit = 0.30 CNY EPS
forecast_assumptions.verification_gate: H1 2026 gross margin and product mix commentary.

core_theses.takeaway: Fenjiu's cash-rich, zero-debt balance sheet and 6% dividend yield provide a floor valuation of ~85-95 CNY, limiting absolute downside even in a prolonged downturn.
core_theses.decisive_question: What is the asset-backed liquidation value that protects against permanent capital loss?
core_theses.evidence: EV011: net cash 12.5 bn, zero interest-bearing debt, DPS 6.56 CNY; market cap 133.7 bn, EV 121.2 bn.
core_theses.strongest_counterevidence: If profits drop below 8 bn and dividend is halved, floor shifts to 70 CNY; not visible yet.
core_theses.financial_transmission: Floor value = net cash + bear case earnings power (8.5 bn) × 10x PE, implying ~850-950 CNY bn market cap.
core_theses.market_pricing: Current price 109.56 CNY equates to 133.7 bn market cap, already 40% above this floor, suggesting the market is not pricing total collapse.
core_theses.falsification_gate: Net profit below 8 bn or DPS below 4 CNY in 2027 would breach the floor thesis.

core_theses.takeaway: Channel health (contract liabilities +35.9%, 2-3 month inventory) indicates the downturn is a manageable cycle, not a structural brand erosion.
core_theses.decisive_question: Is the brand losing traction with distributors and end consumers?
core_theses.evidence: EV012 contract liabilities; KPE03 management commentary; KPE04 stable Qinghua 20 sell-through.
core_theses.strongest_counterevidence: Qinghua 30 weak demand and rebates could spill over to brand perception; consumer scan rate coverage only 30%.
core_theses.financial_transmission: Healthy channels prevent a revenue cliff and support base case revenue -6.9% YoY.
core_theses.market_pricing: Multiple contraction to 12x PE already prices a cyclical earnings decline, not a brand demise; if channel health holds, multiple can rebound.
core_theses.falsification_gate: If contract liabilities decline YoY for two consecutive quarters and Qinghua 20 wholesale price breaks below 340 CNY.

company_disaggregation: Segment: Qinghua series (~47% of revenue pool). Qinghua 20: volume stable, wholesale price 350-360 CNY, requires no rebates, inventory low; Qinghua 30: volume weak, wholesale price 670 CNY, needs rebates, margin pressure. Lao Baifen series (~13%): mid-range, short-term disruption from code system upgrade, recovery expected H2 2026. Bo Fen series (~26%): mass-market demand strong, tight supply-demand, provides volume floor but dilutes mix. Other: ~3% negligible. Geography: majority revenue still from Shanxi province; national expansion underway but no segmental disclosure. Customer/cash cycle: prepaid model, near-zero receivables, inventory turnover 0.6x. Competitive risk: Qinghua 30 competes with Guojiao 1573 (830-850 CNY), significant price gap. Missing data: product-level gross margin, regional revenue split. All segment judgements rely on channel surveys (private evidence) and public consolidated financials.
autonomous_forecast_model: Three-year operating driver model. Drivers: revenue driven by volume × ASP, with volume a function of industry demand, channel inventory change, and product mix. 2026E: total revenue 360.6 bn CNY (-6.9% YoY), gross margin 74.25% (vs 74.85% in 2025), SG&A/sales ratio ~47% (flat), government subsidy ~0.3 bn. Net profit 11.06 bn (-9.7%), EPS 9.07 CNY. 2027E: revenue 37.75 bn (+4.7%), margin 74.5%, net profit 11.80 bn (+6.7%), EPS 9.68 CNY. 2028E: revenue 39.7 bn (+5.2%), margin 75.0%, net profit 12.80 bn (+8.5%), EPS 10.50 CNY. Cash flow: OCF ~ equal net profit given prepaid model. Capex rising due to 2030 technical project, FCF still positive but uncertain until capex disclosed. No debt. Dividend payout 65%, DPS 5.9 / 6.3 / 6.8 CNY. Diluted shares 1,219.96 mn. Model is top-down at product line level due to lack of segment volume/ASP data; verification gates for margins and contract liabilities.
thesis_financial_bridge: Thesis 1 (asset floor): bear net profit 8.5 bn × 10 PE = 85 bn market cap + net cash 12.5 bn = 97.5 bn, per share 80 CNY. Thesis 2 (channel cycle): base net profit 11.06 bn × 12 PE = 132.7 bn, per share 108.8 CNY. Bull scenario: net profit 12.92 bn × 15 PE = 193.8 bn, per share 159 CNY. Weighted probability: 55% base, 25% bull, 20% bear → 0.55*108.8 + 0.25*159 + 0.2*80 = 59.84 + 39.75 + 16 = 115.6 CNY fair value. Current price 109.56 CNY offers marginal upside, consistent with Hold rating. Key sensitivity: each 1% gross margin change shifts fair value ~3 CNY.
moat_evidence_verdict: Brand moat: Qinghua is the standard-setter for Qing-xiang baijiu, strong provincial loyalty, but national premiumization limited (Qinghua 30 vs Guojiao 1573). Cash conversion moat: prepaid model, OCF/NP >1x proven over 5 years. Distribution moat: wide network, contract liabilities growth signals dealer commitment. Counterevidence: Qinghua 30 pricing power weaker than peers, cost to maintain shelf space rising, product mix downgrading erodes ROIC (32.9% in 2025 but declining). Moat transmission to financials: brand supports premium pricing gap fill potential; cash cycle ensures downside protection. Moat rating: intact but under pressure, requiring H2 2026 evidence of margin stabilization.
valuation_closure: Mutually exclusive buckets: (1) Core earnings power: base case 2026E net profit 11.06 bn, 12x multiple, value 132.7 bn (108.8/share). (2) Scenario optionality: bull case adds 61.1 bn if Qinghua 30 recovers, but only 25% probability. Bear case subtracts 47.7 bn. Probability-weighted fair value 115.6 CNY. Current price 109.56 CNY implies 5.5% upside, within holding threshold. No hidden assets. Double-counting check: dividend yield does not add separate value. Recommendation consistency: Hold / Positive Watch because fair value margin of safety <10%.

canonical_model_snapshot.formula: Year 1 = seasonality-adjusted Q1 2026 (Q1 rev / 48.7% median share).  Year 2 +3%, Year 3 +4% as destocking ends and out-of-province expansion resumes.
Year 1 = seasonality-adjusted Q1 2026 (Q1 rev / 48.7% median share).  Year 2 +3%, Year 3 +4% as destocking ends and out-of-province expansion resumes.
Year 1 reflects mix shift and margin pressure from product transition.  Gradual recovery as premiumisation resumes.
Year 1 reflects mix shift and margin pressure from product transition.  Gradual recovery as premiumisation resumes.
Operating margin = gross margin – SG&A ratio – R&D ratio.  SG&A ratio assumed ~33% in 2026E, gradually declining.

model_change_rows.eps_fcf_valuation_impact: Negligible (2 mn revenue -> ~0.5 mn net profit)

model_change_rows.reason: Aligned with Q1 actual margin (74.25%) and persistent Qinghua 30 mix pressure.

accepted_underwriting_model:
# Accepted Underwriting Model: Shanxi Fenjiu (600809.SH)

**Model date:** 2026-07-14
**Status:** Partial – product-level margin and regional splits missing.

## Operating drivers
- Revenue = ∑ (product volume × ASP) 
- Gross margin blended: Q1 2026 actual 74.25%, base case flat 74.25% for 2026E.
- SG&A/sales ratio flat ~47%.
- Tax rate ~25%.
- Minority interest negligible.

## Three-year consolidated forecast
| Line | 2026E | 2027E | 2028E |
|------|-------|-------|-------|
| Revenue (CNY mn) | 36,060 | 37,750 | 39,700 |
| Gross margin | 74.25% | 74.5% | 75.0% |
| Net profit to parent (CNY mn) | 11,060 | 11,800 | 12,800 |
| EPS (CNY) | 9.07 | 9.68 | 10.50 |
| DPS (CNY) | 5.90 | 6.30 | 6.80 |
| Diluted shares (mn) | 1,219.96 | 1,219.96 | 1,219.96 |

## Bull/Base/Bear probabilities
- Base (55%): 2026E net profit 11,060 mn, 12x PE → fair value 108.8/sh
- Bull (25%): 12,920 mn, 15x → 159/sh
- Bear (20%): 8,500 mn, 10x → 80/sh
Probability-weighted fair value: 115.6/sh.

## Missing data
- Product-level volume, ASP, gross margin (only Q1 blended).
- FCF/Capex: not disclosed, assumed positive OCF but rising capex.
- Regional revenue and profitability.

## Verification gates
- H1 2026 report: gross margin ≥74%, contract liabilities positive YoY.
- Qinghua 30 wholesale price returning to >700 CNY.
model_change_ledger:
| Line | Original | Accepted | Reason | Impact | Disposition |
|------|----------|----------|--------|--------|-------------|
| 2026E revenue | 36,062 mn | 36,060 mn | Rounding | negligible | Accepted |
| 2026E gross margin | 74.5% | 74.25% | Q1 actual mix pressure | EPS -0.06, FV -0.7/sh | Accepted |
debate_verdict: The bull case for immediate positioning was rejected because Qinghua 30 recovery cannot be validated before H2 2026. The bear argument that margin erosion could intensify to 72% was partially incorporated by lowering base margin to 74.25%. Model improved by anchoring to Q1 actuals and adding contract liabilities as a leading indicator. No side 'won'; the result is a Hold rating with specific verification gates.
probability_payoff: Base 55%: fair value 108.8/sh; Bull 25%: 159/sh; Bear 20%: 80/sh. Weighted FV 115.6/sh vs. price 109.56, upside +5.5%. Downside 27% in bear case, upside 45% in bull. Skew positive but low absolute margin of safety.
unresolved_questions_and_gaps:
- Qinghua 30 recovery timeline and margin impact unknown.
- Actual FCF and capex over 2026-2028 not disclosed.
- Provincial vs national revenue split missing.
- Product-level volume and ASP publicly unavailable.
- Conflicting evidence: contract liabilities strength vs Qinghua 30 weakness.
handoff_to_pm_and_trader: Accepted model version: 2026-07-14 base case net profit 11.06 bn, FV 108.8/sh. Position constraint: no more than 1/3 of intended allocation at current price; add only after H1 report confirms margin ≥74% and contract liabilities YoY positive. Catalysts: H1 report (Aug), Qinghua 30 wholesale price >700 CNY. Falsification: if H1 net profit <10 bn or gross margin <73%, downgrade to Hold/Neutral Wait. Do not assume a quick industry recovery or Qinghua 30 margin expansion without observable proof.
handoff_integrity_audit: Model version: 2026-07-14-18. Frozen facts: FY2025 revenue 38.72 bn, net profit 12.25 bn, gross margin 74.85%, diluted shares 1219.96 mn. Accepted estimates: 2026E revenue 36,060 mn, gross margin 74.25%, net profit 11,060 mn, DPS 5.90 CNY. Unresolved cells: product-level revenue, margin, capex, regional splits. Business units preserved: Qinghua, Lao Baifen, Bofen, Other. Forecast lines preserved: revenue, gross margin, net profit, EPS, DPS. Financial bridge preserved: base/bull/bear scenarios with explicit probabilities. Valuation buckets: base 12x, bull 15x, bear 10x. PM must maintain these building blocks and explicitly document any revision.
